name: Bovine Blood (BMDB normal metabolome)
description: Bovine Blood medium from the Bovine Metabolome Database (BMDB) normal (healthy-subject) metabolite concentrations, mapped to BiGG exchanges, with a mineral base. Concentrations are medians of reported normal values (concentration_mM); original HMDB values retained per component.

provenance.citation: Bovine Metabolome Database (BMDB; Foroutan A et al., 2020, bovinedb.ca), normal bovine Blood concentrations. Primary refs PMID: 11204708, 12021065, 17197001, 19275474, 20163597, 20647382, 21172370, 21524548, 22274861, 22370585.
provenance.notes: Normal-condition concentrations only; medians across reports; units converted to mM where MW/units allowed. Presence-based uptake bounds; concentration_mM + hmdb_orig retained. Mineral base added.

components.name: 1 alpha D Galactosyl myo inositol C12H22O11

oxygen_note: blood/serum O2 is limited and venous/arterial-dependent; not an aerobic broth
